title: echinolobium varium
intro: Echinolobium varium, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies, which are said to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Echinolobium varium is also used to treat digestive issues and as a natural remedy for snake bites, due to its potential to neutralize snake venom.
